overall.description: First-person exploration of a dystopian urban slum in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring burning trash piles, graffiti-covered makeshift buildings, and industrial structures beneath a massive concrete overpass during golden hour lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with burning trash pile beneath overpass

agents.ego_description: circling around a large burning trash pile while observing the surrounding street and overpass structure

entered.detail: large pile of garbage bags engulfed in flames with thick smoke rising
massive elevated highway structure spanning across the street
makeshift structures with rusted metal siding and graffiti
concrete barriers with red and white stripes lining the street edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a close view of a burning trash pile in an urban slum area. The camera circles left around the fire, revealing a massive concrete overpass overhead and makeshift corrugated metal buildings lining the street. Red and white striped barriers separate the walkway from the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley entrance between industrial buildings

events.description: turns right from main street into a narrow alleyway between buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk and turning into a narrow alley, passing a pedestrian

notable_agents.action: walking toward the camera in the alleyway wearing casual clothing

entered.detail: narrow passage between tall buildings with trash scattered on ground
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags including 'CALI'

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along the main street beneath the overpass, then turns right into a narrow alley. A pedestrian walks toward the camera in the confined space between graffiti-covered industrial buildings. The burning trash pile falls behind as the scene transitions to the alley entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with trash piles and burning barrel

events.description: approaches a burning barrel and large puddle reflecting the sky

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrow alley, examining the burning barrel and trash piles

entered.detail: metal barrel with open fire burning inside, emitting smoke
large water puddle on asphalt reflecting the sky and surroundings
stacks of blue and black garbage bags piled against the wall

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds deeper into the narrow alley, passing piles of blue and black trash bags. A burning metal barrel provides flickering light near a large puddle that reflects the sky overhead. The walls are covered in graffiti, and the space feels enclosed and secluded from the main street.

scene_state.functional_zone: open area with large curved wall and makeshift structures

events.description: emerges from narrow alley into open area with large curved stadium-like wall

agents.ego_description: emerging from the alley into an open area, turning to survey the large curved wall and surrounding buildings

entered.detail: massive curved concrete wall with faded painted text and triangular openings at base
elevated water tank on metal supports above the buildings
piles of wooden pallets and construction materials

segments.scene_description: Exiting the narrow alley, the scene opens into a wider area dominated by a massive curved wall resembling a stadium structure. A water tower rises above the corrugated metal buildings, and stacks of lumber sit near the path. The ground transitions from asphalt to dirt as the camera turns to survey the environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: main street beneath overpass with burning vehicle

events.description: passes a burning van on the side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking along the main street beneath the overpass, passing a burning van and approaching distant pedestrians

entered.detail: black van engulfed in flames on the side of the road
illuminated storefront signs visible under the overpass

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to the main street beneath the massive concrete overpass, now backlit by the setting sun. A van burns on the roadside as the camera moves forward. Neon signs become visible in the distance under the overpass, and scattered pedestrians appear further down the street.

events.description: turns left onto sidewalk heading uphill away from the main intersection

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass through an intersection, then turning left onto a sidewalk heading uphill

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking along the sidewalk under the overpass

entered.detail: concrete pedestrian walkway with metal railing on the left side
steep rocky terrain rising behind the buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the underpass intersection where neon signs illuminate the storefronts. Several pedestrians walk along the street. The camera then turns left onto a concrete sidewalk that climbs uphill, with a rocky hillside visible to the left and utility poles lining the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gritty urban slum that transitions from a claustrophobic alleyway into a wide, neon-lit industrial intersection. It begins by circling a burning trash pile beneath a massive concrete overpass, moving past corrugated metal buildings and striped barriers before turning right into a narrow, graffiti-covered alley. As the camera pushes deeper into this secluded space, it passes piles of trash bags and a flickering metal barrel reflecting in a puddle, before finally emerging into a wider area dominated by a curved stadium-like wall and a towering water tower. The scene then shifts back to the main street, where the setting sun backlights a burning van and distant neon signs, leading the camera through a bustling intersection of storefronts and pedestrians. Finally, the movement turns left onto a concrete sidewalk that climbs uphill alongside a rocky hillside and a line of utility poles.
